params.hops: ABI-encoded Hop[] describing the swap sequence.
params.minProfit: Minimum profit in token base units. Reverts if not met — protects                   against executing when the opportunity has already been taken.

execute(address[],uint256[],bytes,uint25.notice: Initiate a Balancer flash loan then execute the arb path.
